name: senderkit
description: Build complete messaging experiences right from your AI coding agent. Add transactional email, SMS, push, and web-push — welcome emails, OTPs, receipts, and more — then create templates, send, and monitor every message your app sends. One messaging layer, no provider lock-in.

interface.shortDescription: Send email, SMS & push from your AI agent.
interface.longDescription: Build complete messaging experiences right from your AI coding agent. Add transactional email, SMS, push, and web-push — welcome emails, OTPs, receipts, and more — then create templates, send, and monitor every message your app sends. One messaging layer, no provider lock-in. Wire it into your codebase, or just send and inspect messages live over MCP.
defaultPrompt: Add a welcome email when a user signs up.
Set up SMS OTP / verification codes in this app.
Send a test email and check its status via SenderKit MCP.
